Class ReminderInfo

java.lang.Object
org.novastack.iposca.cust.reminders.ReminderInfo
public class ReminderInfo extends Object
A java bean to hold the required reminder data for reminder PDF generation by JasperReports

    static final record 
    ReminderInfo.Merchant
    A record used by all Jasper-facing factory or java bean classes to store merchant information.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReminderInfo

      public ReminderInfo(String customerName, String customerAddress, String customerPhone, YearMonth issueMonthYear, LocalDate newDueDate, float debt)
      Constructor for the ReminderInfo class.
      Parameters:
      customerName - The name of the customer.
      customerAddress - The address of the customer.
      customerPhone - The phone number of the customer.
      issueMonthYear - The month of the billing cycle.
      newDueDate - The new due date for repayments.
      debt - The debt accumulated for the customer.

  • Method Details

    • setReminderInfo

      public static ReminderInfo setReminderInfo(CustomerDebt cd, CustomerEnums.ReminderType type)
      Factory method to create a ReminderInfo object from a CustomerDebt object and a given reminder type. From the CustomerDebt object, we retrieve the customer's ID and from that we can retrieve a Customer object to get the customer's address and phone number. We also retrieve the customer's reminder date, based on the provided reminder type. We then get the balance of the customer's debt.
      Parameters:
      cd - The customer debt object.
      type - The type of reminder.
